query: Plot on the map the xView1 images in Dar es-Salam, Tanzania from Summer 2017! Make sure you consider a very very wide area!

task0.objective: Fetch images from the xView1 dataset filtered for Dar es-Salam, Tanzania from Summer 2017.

task1.objective: Plot the fetched xView1 images on the map, ensuring to cover a very wide area.
